issues.description: Effect is drastically oversimplified. Missing: (1) 'Look at 4 cards' mechanic, (2) filter for {Cross Guild} type, (3) 'up to 1' card limit, (4) placement of remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only searches deck generically.
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to {Cross Guild} type cards only.

SearchDeck action does not capture the 'look at 4 cards' mechanic or the requirement to place remaining cards at bottom in any order. This is a multi-step effect that cannot be fully represented by SearchDeck alone.

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Cross Guild} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
